title: alyssum ramosissimum
intro: Alyssum ramosissimum, also known as white carpet or sweet alyssum, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing stress and promoting relaxation, thanks to its calming properties. Alyssum ramosissimum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
